## Validation

- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun test`
- [ ] `bun run build`
- [ ] Manual smoke test (if UI or worker behavior changed)

## Docs and Release Notes

- [ ] I updated docs for behavior/configuration/API changes.
- [ ] I added a changelog entry when user-visible behavior changed.

## Risk Review

- [ ] No secrets or auth artifacts were committed.
- [ ] Backward-compatibility impact is documented.
- [ ] I considered security/privacy implications.
